meta.note: Three GSD2T strategy candidates compared side-by-side. Sector Rotation backtested 2000-2018 on FF industry data. Multi-Factor L/S and Tech+VIX backtested 2001-2026 on S&P 500. All simulated, net of transaction costs.

sector_rotation.name: Sector Rotation
sector_rotation.description: Macro-conditioned cross-sectional momentum on 30 industries. Long-only top quartile, gross exposure scaled by macro regime composite.
sector_rotation.universe: 30 FF industries (proxy for 11 SPDR sector ETFs)

multi_factor_ls.name: Multi-Factor L/S
multi_factor_ls.description: Cross-sectional 3-factor composite (momentum + low-vol + reversal) on S&P 500. Long top quintile, short bottom quintile, dollar-neutral.

tech_vix.name: Tech + VIX Overlay
tech_vix.description: Cross-sectional momentum L/S WITHIN GICS Tech subset of S&P 500. Gross exposure scaled by VIX regime (100% if VIX<16, scaling to 0% above 32).
